---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest new coverage, a new reference doc, or a new playbook
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's missing?

What question would a user ask that the skill currently can't answer well?

## Suggested change

- [ ] Add a new reference file
- [ ] Expand an existing reference file
- [ ] Update `SKILL.md` decision tree
- [ ] Other

## Sources

Cite the ObservePoint help-center page, regulation text, or other primary source that should drive the content. **Public sources only** — no confidential material.

## Priority

How often does this question come up? (`rarely` / `monthly` / `weekly` / `daily`)
